Imagination Louis Vuitton

for men

main accords citrus fresh spicy amber

Imagination by Louis Vuitton is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. Imagination was launched in 2021. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud.

Top Notes

Citron Calabrian bergamot

Middle Notes

Neroli Ginger

Base Notes

Black Tea Ambroxan
